mission_name: ADSC reference research campaign (numerical simulation only)
notes: Reference profile for the ADSC research simulation campaign. target_owner_consent=true is a declared SCENARIO ASSUMPTION (spec D9), never a legal fact. post_mission_disposal_lifetime_years=25.0 is the IADC-guideline design target used by the WP3 trades (a research placeholder, not a demonstrated capability; under a US FCC flight scenario the operative figure would be 5 years). Targets are class-level presets - no specific catalog object, no live ephemerides, no operational products.
